title: Roasted Smoke-Roasted Mexican Graham Cracker Quesadilla
description: A yeasty, springy, monsoon-style mexican snack featuring graham cracker crumbs, smoke-hot spices and keto-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup chopped fresh herbs (e.g. cilantro, parsley)

instructions: In a bowl, mix the cheese with crumbled graham crackers, smoked paprika and cayenne pepper. Add salt for taste.
Heat butter in an oven-safe skillet over medium heat. Once melted, pour the cheese mixture evenly onto the pan.
Cook for about 3 minutes or until the edges start to brown slightly.
Remove from heat and let it cool down for a moment before flipping with a spatula.
Top each quichelette with grilled or roasted vegetables if using, followed by fresh herbs.
Return to oven for another minute or so, or until everything is heated through.
Serve hot as a snack or side dish.
